personalInfo.name: Anup Yadav
personalInfo.title: Software Engineer
personalInfo.summary: Highly motivated Software Engineer with 4+ years of experience in backend development, API testing, and code optimization. Proven expertise in building scalable cloud-native applications using Node.js and Python, designing RESTful APIs and microservices, and optimizing system performance. Experienced in AWS services, Snowflake data modeling, CI/CD pipelines, and secure architectures aligned with SOC2, ISO27001, and GDPR compliance. Strong background in AI/ML workflow integration, monitoring systems, and deployment automation with a focus on reliability, scalability, and performance.

highlights: Led backend/API testing initiatives with automated testing, reducing post-release bugs by 15%.
Designed and implemented cron-based monitoring systems, improving production stability by 75%.
Developed monitoring and alerting tools, increasing system uptime by 20%.
Automated deployment workflows using CI/CD pipelines, reducing deployment time by 25-30%.
Implemented microservices architecture, improving application scalability and performance by 15%.
Managed UAT and production rollouts ensuring smooth deployment and post-release stability.
Improved cross-team collaboration by standardizing communication protocols, reducing issue resolution time by 10%.
Achieved 95% task success rate while independently handling critical backend systems.
Optimized workflows using PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Jenkins, Postman, and Putty.
Contributed to backend development using Python and system design principles.
Improved application performance, reducing response time by 20%.
Collaborated with frontend teams to implement responsive design, improving user engagement by 10%.
Worked on scalable architecture and performance optimization techniques.
Developed backend systems using Python with seamless integration across services.
Integrated legacy systems, improving data consistency and reducing errors by 15%.
Developed new features improving system efficiency and usability.
Optimized database design and application logic for better performance.

projects.title: Loan Management System Development
projects.technologies: API Integration, Backend Development, RESTful APIs, PostgreSQL
projects.description: Designed and developed a comprehensive Loan Management System for fintech clients to streamline loan processing and tracking. Implemented automated workflows improving efficiency by 30%. Built robust loan lifecycle management ensuring data integrity and accuracy. Integrated a document management system reducing processing time by 40% and improving operational efficiency.

projects.title: KYC Management System Enhancement
projects.technologies: KYC APIs, Data Encryption, Regulatory Compliance Frameworks
projects.description: Enhanced KYC verification system by automating workflows and improving compliance. Reduced processing time by 25% and ensured adherence to regulatory standards. Implemented strong security mechanisms and improved overall user experience.

projects.title: Financial Management Services for NBFC Lenders
projects.technologies: Financial APIs, Payment Gateways, Data Analytics
projects.description: Designed and deployed financial management systems for NBFC lenders to track loan portfolios. Built real-time dashboards and reporting tools providing actionable insights. Reduced operational costs by 15% and improved loan processing efficiency by 20%.

projects.title: AMS System Development for API Logging
projects.technologies: Logging Frameworks, API Monitoring Tools, PostgreSQL
projects.description: Developed an advanced logging and monitoring system for API requests and responses. Improved system reliability by 70% through proactive monitoring and alerting. Enabled faster debugging and performance optimization through detailed logging mechanisms.

projects.title: Multi-Simulation Risk Engine (Open Source)
projects.technologies: Python, Node.js, API Design, Quantitative Finance Models
projects.description: Built a scalable risk simulation engine supporting Monte Carlo, Bootstrapping, and Scenario Analysis. Designed dual backend architecture with Python and Node.js for flexibility. Optimized performance using parallelization techniques and developed APIs for financial forecasting, stress testing, and risk modeling. Released as an open-source project.

certifications.name: Frontend Developer Certification
certifications.description: Developed strong proficiency in building interactive and user-friendly frontend applications.

certifications.name: React.js Certification
certifications.description: Gained expertise in building modern web applications using React.js.

certifications.name: McKinsey.org Forward Program
certifications.description: Completed a comprehensive program focused on leadership and professional development.
